summary: 2-Level Microsoft OAuth Architecture fully tested. Backend: 9/9 new tests pass + 18/18 conflict detection regression tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Calendar active banner, Teams upgrade banner with 'Activer Teams avancé' button (for has_online_meetings_scope=false). Teams upgrade flow redirects to Microsoft OAuth with correct TEAMS_SCOPES. Fixed frontend bug where Teams upgrade button used undefined variables.

backend: test_teams_upgrade_requires_outlook_connection - teams-upgrade returns 400 if no Outlook connection exists
test_adapter_scope_definitions - outlook_calendar_adapter.py defines BASE_SCOPES, TEAMS_SCOPES, and SCOPES=BASE_SCOPES
test_meeting_provider_service_reads_from_db - meeting_provider_service.py reads has_online_meetings_scope from DB (not from adapter SCOPES)
test_conflict_check_endpoint_works - Conflict detection endpoint still works (regression test)
frontend: Outlook Calendar card displayed with connected email (igaal@hotmail.com)
Calendar active banner displayed: 'Calendrier Outlook synchronisé'
'Activer Teams avancé' button visible and clickable
Teams upgrade button redirects to Microsoft OAuth with TEAMS_SCOPES
Google Calendar card displayed with connected email (igaal.hanouna@gmail.com)
Toast for outlook=upgraded_teams shows correct success message (code verified)

calendar_routes.py.callback: Writes has_online_meetings_scope based on granted_scopes - lines 318-333

meeting_provider_service.py.NOT_MODIFIED: File reads has_online_meetings_scope from DB, not from adapter SCOPES constant

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/settings/Integrations.js (fixed Teams upgrade button - was using undefined setConnectingState and api)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with Outlook connection (igaal@hotmail.com, has_online_meetings_scope=false)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 2-Level Microsoft OAuth architecture complete. Key features: (1) /api/calendar/connect/outlook uses BASE_SCOPES (calendar only), (2) /api/calendar/connect/outlook/teams-upgrade uses TEAMS_SCOPES (includes OnlineMeetings.ReadWrite + OnlineMeetingArtifact.Read.All), (3) teams-upgrade requires existing Outlook connection, (4) callback writes has_online_meetings_scope and scope_level based on granted scopes, (5) meeting_provider_service.py delegated mode reads has_online_meetings_scope from DB. Frontend data-testid attributes: outlook-calendar-card, outlook-calendar-active-banner, teams-upgrade-banner, teams-delegated-active-banner, upgrade-teams-btn. Test user has Outlook connected with has_online_meetings_scope=false (personal account igaal@hotmail.com).

mocked_apis.note: Microsoft OAuth flow is real but requires user interaction to complete. The Teams upgrade button correctly redirects to Microsoft OAuth with TEAMS_SCOPES.
